ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., SystemTest1, Production) */,
  "soap_url" TEXT /* SOAP URL for the environment's services */,
  "admin_url" TEXT /* Administrative URL for managing the environment */,
  "execute_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if services can be executed in this environment (Y/N) */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., development, testing, production) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_connections" (
  "conn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database connection */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the connection belongs to */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Database connection string */,
  "db_username" TEXT /* Database username */,
  "db_password" TEXT /* Database password */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of the database (e.g., Oracle, MySQL) */,
  "ssl_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if SSL is enabled for the connection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_connections_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, tester) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_environment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_environment_access_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_environment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_executions" (
  "exec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service execution */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the service was executed */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "executed_by" TEXT /* User who executed the service */,
  "exec_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed log of the execution */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the service execution */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data generated by the service execution */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service execution in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_executions_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_executions_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, configuration change) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Detailed changes in this version */,
  "rollback_possible" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version can be rolled back */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_versions_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_definitions" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint URL for the service */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_headers" TEXT /* Required request headers for the service */,
  "response_headers" TEXT /* Expected response headers from the service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service definition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service definition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_environment_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service-environment mapping */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_environment_mapping_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES service_definitions ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_environment_mapping_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)
